title: cephalanthera ensifolia var. longibracteata
intro: Cephalanthera ensifolia var. longibracteata, also known as the Chinese Helleborine, is a rare orchid species native to China, characterized by its long bracts and sword-shaped leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Chinese Helleborine include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory conditions. Chinese Helleborine can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
